data.title: ETSY, SHOP Shares Rise after OpenAI Changes Its ChatGPT Shopping Approach
data.description:
Microsoft-backed (MSFT) AI firm OpenAI is reportedly stepping back from its plan to allow users to shop directly inside the ChatGPT app, according to a report from The Information. Previously, the company introduced a shopping feature that let users purchase items from e-commerce companies such as Etsy (ETSY) and Shopify (SHOP) without leaving the chatbot. However, that approach is now changing. Going forward, instead of completing purchases inside ChatGPT itself, users will be redirected to external apps that connect to ChatGPT in order to finish the checkout process.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Indeed, a spokesperson explained that the Instant Checkout feature will now be integrated into apps, where purchases can happen more smoothly. In other words, ChatGPT will still help users discover products, but the actual buying process will be handled by partner apps rather than the chatbot interface itself. As a result, merchants and users can complete transactions in a more familiar and streamlined environment. Interestingly, Etsy and Shopify shares are up at the time of writing.

At the same time, the decision also highlights some of the difficulties involved in running shopping services inside an AI chatbot. For example, details such as product prices and inventory levels need to be constantly updated, which can be difficult to manage within a conversational system. In addition, protecting users from fraudulent or accidental purchases becomes more complicated when transactions occur through AI interactions. That's why Shopify President Harley Finkelstein recently noted that the slow rollout of AI shopping tools is largely due to companies still working through these technical challenges.

Which E-Commerce Stock Is the Better Buy?

Turning to Wall Street, out of the two e-commerce stocks mentioned above, analysts think that SHOP stock has more room to run than ETSY. In fact, SHOP's price target of $163.23 per share implies 23% upside versus ETSY's 11.4%.
data.author: Vince Condarcuri

data.title: Cathie Wood Dumps $40M of ROKU, Pumps $14M in Amazon
data.description:
Cathie Wood's ARK Invest ETFs (exchange-traded funds) made notable portfolio adjustments on Wednesday, March 4, as shown in ARK's daily fund disclosures. Wood executed high-volume buy and sell trades across global stocks worth millions, capitalizing on price dips fueled by escalating Iran tensions. Here's a quick overview of her trades.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Here's What Wood Sold on Wednesday

The largest trade of the day was the sale of 412,711 shares of TV-streaming platform Roku Inc. (ROKU) for about $40 million, locking in gains after its 3.7% surge yesterday. Its shares have been highly volatile since reporting fiscal fourth-quarter results on February 14. Wood has been actively reducing exposure to Roku over the past couple of weeks.

She also offloaded 13,663 shares of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) for roughly $4.89 million, while its stock price was up 1.2%. Shares had reversed course after the prior day's 5.5% dip due to geopolitical tensions.

Wood continued to reduce the fund's stake in Iridium Communications (IRDM), selling 202,146 shares worth about $4.95 million.

What Did Wood Buy on March 4?

On the buy side, ARK's largest trade was the purchase of 66,934 shares of American e-commerce and cloud-computing giant Amazon (AMZN) for $14.51 million. Amazon's data centers were hit by drone attacks in Dubai amid the Middle East war. However, AMZN stock gained 3.9% after announcing an additional $21 billion investment in Spain.

ARK also bought 176,884 shares of gaming platform Roblox (RBLX) for about $11.92 million. It acquired 542,828 shares of Genius Sports (GENI) for $3.28 million, capitalizing on the sports data and technology company's 6.7% drop. These moves align with Wood's growing conviction in the gaming and technology sectors.

Other smaller trades included buying 200,856 shares of Joby Aviation (JOBY) for nearly $2 million and 419,919 shares of Archer Aviation (ACHR) totaling $2.84 million.

Wood's Strategic Portfolio Shuffle

Let's see how these stocks perform using the TipRanks Stock Comparison Tool.

Currently, analysts have a "Strong Buy" consensus rating on Genius Sports, Amazon, TSM, and ROKU. Among them, GENI stock has the highest upside potential over the next twelve months, but it is a loss-making company. AMZN and ROKU stocks also offer more than 30% upside potential.
data.author: Sheryl Sheth

data.title: Lululemon (LULU) Claims It Can Hide People's Sweat. But What About the Smell?
data.description:
Canadian athletic apparel retailer Lululemon (LULU) has launched a new product that it claims can hide people's sweat. Unfortunately, investors seem unimpressed, sending the stock down 1% on March 5.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

In a news release, Lululemon Athletica announced the launch of its new sweat-concealing technology designed for high-sweat activities. The company claims the new technology is the world's first and conceals high volumes of sweat while ensuring enhanced breathability and a lightweight feel.

The new sweat-concealing clothing line was designed in consultation with American tennis player Frances Tiafoe, who is sponsored by Lululemon and wears the company's clothing. Tiafoe will reportedly showcase the new sweat-hiding clothes at the BNP Paribas Open tennis tournament this week.

Frances Tiafoe Looking His Best

"When I feel and look my best, it helps me perform my best," said Frances Tiafoe in Lululemon's news release. "For someone who sweats as much as I do, it's amazing to have a kit that keeps me looking fresh from start to finish."

Lululemon says it began developing the new sweat-concealing clothing line in 2024 and is hoping that this latest product will help revive its sales and stock, which is down 50% over the past year. Lululemon has been forced to recall several of its new products after consumers reacted badly to them.

Is LULU Stock a Buy?

Lululemon Athletica's stock has a consensus Hold rating among 21 Wall Street analysts. That rating is based on one Buy and 20 Hold recommendations issued in the last three months. The average LULU price target of $210.53 implies 22.17% upside from current levels.
data.author: Joel Baglole

data.title: Fed's Barkin Warns of Inflation Risks from Higher Gas Prices
data.description:
Federal Reserve Bank of Richmond President Tom Barkin cautioned on Thursday that higher gas prices could lead to rising inflation and fewer interest rate cuts. The price for a gallon of gas in the U.S. has risen by 26.8 cents compared to the prior week amid disruptions to the Strait of Hormuz.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

"Textbook monetary policy would be you look through a short-term shock, but you don't look through a long-term shock, and I think that's a lot of the assessment people are going to have to make," Barkin told Bloomberg.

Barkin Expects Inflation to Remain 'Relatively High' ahead of March FOMC

Barkin added that recent data points to "a couple months of relatively high inflation." Core personal consumption expenditures (PCE), the Fed's preferred gauge of inflation, last came in at 2.9% in December.

Employment, the other aspect of the Fed's dual mandate, has held up. This morning, outplacement firm Challenger, Gray & Christmas reported that U.S. employers announced 48,307 job cuts in February, down by 72% year-over-year.

The Fed will meet for its next interest rate decision on March 18, when it is widely expected to hold rates steady for a second consecutive meeting.
data.author: Eddie Pan

data.title: BYD Could Put Rival Tesla in the Slow Lane With New 5 Minute Battery Charger
data.description:
Chinese EV maker BYD (BYDDY) is threatening to leave rivals such as Tesla (TSLA) in the slow lane after launching a new battery which can be nearly fully charged in just 5 minutes.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

BYD hopes the move will revitalize the Chinese market and give it an edge over competitors.

Blade Looks Sharp

It said that with the new battery and new charging stations, users could charge their EV batteries to 97% of capacity from 10% in nine minutes. The battery can get to 70% of capacity from 10% in five minutes.

This is the second generation of BYD's blade battery, which it says, given its shape, takes up less space in a car than other batteries.

Some of BYD's mid-range and high-end flagship models will be equipped with the new battery. Among them, the newly released Denza Z9 GT can drive up to about 640 miles on a single charge, the longest range for cars with the battery.

The company also released a new 1,500-kilowatt charging station that it calls a flash charging station. BYD said it aimed to build up to 20,000 charging stations by the end of this year, including 2,000 units on expressways. The company has already built 4,239 stations in China and will build 1,000 charging stations on expressways by May 1.

Rivals Could Get the Chills

BYD Chief Executive Wang Chuanfu said it normally took around 30 to 60 minutes to charge an EV from 10% to 97% in China. By contrast, he said, the new BYD battery could charge in less than 12 minutes from 20% to 97% even in extreme cold when the temperature was minus 30 degrees Celsius.

He said that customers would find that building a flash charging station would be as easy as installing an air conditioner in their own homes.

BYD has had its troubles in its domestic market with sluggish sales. The industry is suffering from expiring government subsidies, a slowing economy and fierce competition.

Rival Tesla has also had its fair share of woes in China. It sold 625,698 vehicles in China in 2025, a 4.8% decline from the year before. However, it has started the year more strongly.

That revival could slip, however, if customers flock to the faster BYD.

We have rounded up the best EV stocks to buy now using our TipRanks comparison tool. As can be seen below, XPeng (XPEV) has, according to analysts, the biggest upside with 62.35%.
data.author: David Craik

data.title: Amazon (AMZN) Rolls Out Healthcare AI Platform to Automate Administrative Work
data.description:
Amazon (AMZN) is expanding its footprint in healthcare with Amazon Connect Health, a new agentic AI platform designed to take over some of the most time‑consuming administrative tasks in medical practices. The system integrates directly into electronic health records and aims to reduce the friction that slows down patient access and burdens clinicians.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

What the Platform Does

The new platform offers five core capabilities that automate high-volume workflows: 

  • Ambient Documentation: Automatically transcribes doctor-patient conversations during visits and drafts clinical notes in real time.
  • Appointment Management: Uses natural language to schedule, reschedule, or cancel appointments around the clock.
  • Medical Coding: Generates billing and procedure codes from clinical documentation to streamline the billing process.
  • Patient Verification: Automates the identity verification process for patients when they contact their healthcare provider.
  • Medical History Summarization: Provides concise summaries of a patient's existing medical records to support clinician decision‑making.

Some features, like ambient documentation, are already widely available, while others, such as automated coding and appointment management, are in preview.

Early Adoption and Impact

Major health systems are already deploying the platform. UC San Diego Health, One Medical, and Netsmart, organizations that collectively manage millions of patient interactions, have integrated Amazon Connect Health into their workflows.

UC San Diego Health reported that the system saves roughly one minute per call and has reduced call abandonment rates by up to 60%.

Is AMZN Stock a Good Buy?

Turning to Wall Street, analysts have a Strong Buy consensus rating on AMZN stock based on 40 Buys and three Holds assigned in the last three months. Furthermore, the average Amazon price target of $279.88 per share implies 29% upside potential.
data.author: Radhika Saraogi

data.title: Nio Orders Hit 2026 High — What's Driving the Turnaround?
data.description:
Chinese EV maker Nio (NIO) saw its weekly vehicle orders reach the highest level of 2026, helped by new promotions aimed at boosting demand. In a new note, Deutsche Bank analyst Bin Wang said Nio's weekly orders climbed to about 3,500 vehicles in early March, marking the company's strongest single-week order level so far this year.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

New Promotions Boost Orders

The rise in orders followed a series of new incentives launched on March 1. These include low-interest auto loans for up to seven years, as well as a 10,000 yuan ($1,450) subsidy to help cover vehicle purchase tax.

Nio also introduced retroactive rewards for recent buyers. Customers who purchased the ES8 SUV in January or February will receive 100,000 Nio points, equal to about 10,000 yuan. Analysts said the promotions likely helped bring back buyers after demand softened earlier in the year.

Shorter Wait Times Help ES8 Orders

Another factor supporting orders is shorter delivery wait times for the ES8 full-size SUV. Dealer checks showed wait times dropped sharply from 13–14 weeks in February to about 4–5 weeks in March, suggesting the order backlog has eased.

Nio's Onvo sub-brand also launched similar promotions to expand its market share. Buyers of the L90 and L60 models can receive a subsidy equal to 5% of the vehicle purchase tax, along with the same seven-year low-interest loan offer.

What to Watch Next for Nio

Looking ahead, investors are watching the upcoming launch of the ES9, Nio's new flagship SUV expected later this year. The model is expected to debut advanced technologies from the ET9 executive sedan, including the SkyRide chassis system, and will compete in the premium segment against models like the Porsche Cayenne Turbo and BMW X7.

Nio's management said the company will hold a technology launch event on April 9, with sales expected in late May and deliveries starting June 1.

Investors will now watch whether the recent jump in orders continues and whether the upcoming ES9 launch and new Onvo models can help support Nio's growth through the rest of 2026.

Is Nio a Buy, Sell, or Hold Now? 

Overall, Wall Street has a Moderate Buy consensus rating on NIO stock based on four Buys and three Holds assigned in the last three months. The average NIO stock price target of $6.49 implies 34.09% upside potential from current levels.
data.author: Shalu Saraf

data.title: The Top Stock Market Threat From the U.S.-Iran War, According to Bank of America
data.description:
The U.S.-Iran war has caused volume at the Strait of Hormuz to collapse by 95%, threatening the supply of oil across the globe. That creates issues for the U.S. economy and gross domestic product (GDP), according to Bank of America.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The price for a barrel of crude oil (CL) has risen by over $10 over the past week. For every $10 increase, inflation could rise 0.1% and GDP could fall by a similar amount, said the firm.

U.S. Less Vulnerable to Oil Shocks as Rate Cut Odds Drop

On the bright side, the U.S. is more insulated from oil shocks than the past because it is now a net exporter of oil and gas.

"We believe U.S. macro risks are likely limited unless [there is a] pronounced oil spike," wrote BofA analyst Meghan Swiber in a note to clients. Swiber added that the firm's baseline outlook for the economy hasn't changed.

Swiber expects the Fed to take on a more cautious approach to lowering interest rates in light of the war. That's been reflected in rate cut odds on the CME FedWatch tool, which have fallen over the past week.
data.author: Eddie Pan

data.title: NYSE Parent ICE Ramps Up On-Chain Push with Stake in Crypto Exchange OKX
data.description:
The Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), the owner of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), has continued to deepen its presence in the digital asset industry. On Thursday, the company revealed that it has taken an undisclosed minority stake in Seychelles-based cryptocurrency exchange OKX, valuing it at $24 billion.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

ICE Teams Up with OKX to Launch Crypto Futures Products

ICE called the deal with OKX a "strategic relationship" that gives it a seat on the exchange's board. However, the partnership has not moved investors, with ICE stock trading marginally lower on Thursday morning.

In a statement, ICE said both companies will work together towards launching U.S.-regulated futures contracts tied to OKX's spot crypto prices, which will also be licensed by the NYSE parent company. The partnership comes several months after the financial market technology and data provider pumped $2 billion in investment into Polymarket, the blockchain-based event prediction platform.
data.author: Solomon Oladipupo
